protocol.name: wlmaker_pointer_position_v1

interface.name: zwlmaker_pointer_position_v1
interface.description: This interface permits clients to follow the pointer position relative to a provided surface.

request.name: follow

description.summary: Creates a new position follower object.

request.description: Creates a new follower instance associated with the provided surface.
